title: DecisionRecommendation
description: A single agent's structured recommendation in response to a decision question.

recommendation.description: One-sentence answer to the question. If the question constrains options, the recommendation must name one of the supplied options verbatim.

rationale.description: Three to six sentences explaining the reasoning behind the recommendation. Cite the trade-offs that mattered.

confidence.description: low = the question is genuinely hard or under-specified. medium = a defensible answer with real trade-offs. high = a clear-cut answer.

option.description: An option you considered but did not recommend.

whyNot.description: One or two sentences on what made this option weaker than the recommendation.

alternativesConsidered.description: Optional list of alternatives weighed and rejected. Empty if only one option was viable.
